message:
feat(test-infra): Seed derivation taxonomy + TestEnvironment enhancements

Test logging (1445 lines added):

Seed derivation (canonical taxonomy):
- derive_component_seed(root, component): per-subsystem seed derivation
- derive_scenario_seed(root, scenario): per-scenario seed derivation
- derive_entropy_seed(root, index): per-iteration for property/fuzz tests
- fnv1a_mix: FNV-1a-based deterministic mixing function (avoids
  randomized DefaultHasher, ensures cross-platform determinism)
- TestContext gains component_seed(), scenario_seed(), entropy_seed()
  convenience methods

TestEnvironment enhancements:
- FixtureService trait: pluggable test service with start/stop/health
- Service registry with ordered startup and reverse-ordered teardown
- Teardown callback registration (on_teardown)
- Metadata write_to_dir for failure artifact generation
- Port isolation between concurrent TestEnvironment instances

Tests for all new infrastructure:
- Seed derivation determinism and independence tests
- TestEnvironment lifecycle, port isolation, teardown idempotency
- Metadata artifact write/read roundtrip

Test utils (29 lines):
- Additional shared test helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
